name: ethernetPacket::protocol::field::ParseAddress
title: ethernetPacket::protocol::field::ParseAddress
description: Sets the protocol field, which has type IPv4 or IPv6 address.
The address must be given in
The method is only available for IPv4 or IPv6 address fields.

parameters.name: addressAsString
parameters.description: Address in text form of format IPv4 or IPv6.
